# CYP2D6-Metabolized Drugs (cyp2d6_substrates)

**3 rules.** Category: drug_metabolism

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `bupleurum_root` | botanical_ingredients | caution | theoretical | May affect prescription drug levels | Saikosaponins inhibit CYP2D6 in vitro and in animal models. Clinical evidence in humans is limited but consistent in mechanism. Bupleurum often appears in multi-herb TCM formulas … |
